trails.name: TRACK - BIG HELLFIRE HUT TO DUCK CREEK
TRACK - FREDS CAMP HUT TO RAKEAHUA HUT
TRACK - FRESHWATER JUNCTION TO FREDS CAM
TRACK - RAKEAHUA HUT TO DOUGHBOY BAY
HUMP RIDGE TK- FLAT CRK TO OKAKA JCN
TURNBULLS TRAMPING TRACK
trails.description: A challenging tramping track through the beautiful, mossy Longwoods forest. Keep an eye out for the historic Turnbull’s Hut, a relic from the gold mining era. This track is part of Te Araroa Trail.

trails.name: WAITUTU RIVER TO BIG RIVER ROUTE
TRACK - YANKEE RIVER HUT TO EAST RUGGEDY
TRACK - BUNGAREE HUT TO XMAS TURN OFF
TRACK - HOMESTEAD TO MASON BAY BEACH
TRACK - CHRISTMAS HUT TO YANKEE RIVER HU
TRACK- EAST RUGGEDY HUT TO HELLFIRE PASS
Freshwater Landing to Mason Bay
trails.description: Backcountry walk over flat tussock wetland and mānuka country to Mason Bay which has one of the most extensive inland dune systems in the Southern Hemisphere.

trails.name: Teal Bay to Lake Poteriteri Hut Route
trails.description: This challenging tramping route travels through remote southern Fiordland forested valleys between Lake Hauroko and Lake Poteriteri.

trails.name: Teal Bay to South Coast Track
trails.description: This difficult tramping track heads from the southern shore of Lake Hauroko, over alpine tops on Hump Ridge and down to the coast at Te Waewae Bay.

trails.name: Long Hilly (Round Hill) Walking Track
trails.description: This is a loop track through historic goldfield within stunning native bush.

trails.name: Pourakino Picnic Area Loop Track
trails.description: This is an easy short walking track following historic tramlines though silver beech forest.
